top_signals.title: Oil Heads for Weekly Decline Despite Hormuz Ship Attack
top_signals.summary: Oil resumed its decline and headed for the biggest weekly drop in a month after transits through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated following an attack on a cargo ship. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Driver’s biometrics case against ULH expands to class action
top_signals.summary:
A lawsuit against an arm of Universal Logistics over the Illinois BIPA law is now a class action.

The post Driver’s biometrics case against ULH expands to class action appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: One factor that may be partly behind the S&P 500's curious action this week
top_signals.summary: There were plenty of reasons for stocks to post a big move on Thursday, but the S&P 500 ended almost exactly where it closed Wednesday.

top_signals.title: Micron sinks as it looks to wrap a whipsaw week of trading
top_signals.summary: Micron Technology's shares tumbled on Friday amid a global sell-off in technology stocks.
